Coming Events

October 1994
Journalism & Newsroom

A listing of upcoming journalism conferences and seminars including the CAR Trek Conference in Silicon Valley in October 1994 and the NICAR Seminar in Columbia, Missouri in January 1995.

Coming Events

October 6-9, 1994 CAR Trek Conference Silicon Valley, California

January 8-13, 1995 NICAR Seminar Columbia, Missouri
